Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: reliefs (sculptures) [300047230], sculpture by technique [300047190], sculpture (visual works) [300047090], visual works by material or technique [300191091], visual works (works) [300191086], Visual Works (hierarchy name) [300179869], Visual and Verbal Communication (hierarchy name) [300264552], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Refers to sculpture executed in relatively shallow relief.
Úsese para obras ejecutadas en relieve relativamente superficial.
Beeldhouwwerken uitgevoerd in relatief laag reliëf.
Bezeichnet eine Arbeit, die in relativ flachem Relief ausgeführt ist.
指浮雕圖案較淺的作品。
Refere-se às esculturas executadas em relevo relativamente na superfície.

Term_Source.Page: carving or embossing or casting moderately protruded from the background plane
low relief; sculp. or carved wk. in which teh figs. project < 1/2 of their true proportions...

Source.Source_ID: 2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)

Term_Source.Page: relief sculpture in which the figs. project slightly from the b-ground

Source.Source_ID: 2000046691/Lucie-Smith, Thames & Hudson Dictionary of Art Terms (1986)

Term_Source.Page: 159, relief scu. in which the figs project less than 1/2 their true depth from the b-ground.

Source.Source_ID: 2000106166/Nomenclature for Museum Cataloging / Nomenclature pour le catalogage translation project (2016-)
